name: GEO Brand Knowledge Graph
description_en: Turns company materials, official sites, products, cases and people into an evidence-backed brand entity knowledge graph, outputting entity/relation lists, a disambiguation table, confidence tiers, Mermaid diagrams, JSON-LD, RDF triples and Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown reports.
description_zh: 把企业资料、官网、产品、客户案例和人物整理成有证据支撑的品牌实体知识图谱，输出实体/关系清单、消歧表、可信等级、Mermaid 图、JSON-LD、RDF 三元组以及 Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown 报告。
long_en: Build a consistent, evidence-traceable brand knowledge graph to power GEO content, page structure and AI-answer consistency.
long_zh: 构建一致、可溯源的品牌知识图谱，为 GEO 内容、页面结构和 AI 答案一致性治理提供底座。
sec_note_en: Bundles two Python scripts: render_yao_geo_brand_graph.py builds Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown plus a quality-report.json from a structured report_input.json, and collect_source_validation.py samples source-URL reachability/page titles (needs network access when run). Reads a source ledger and structured input; writes report files locally. No private/vendor-system dependency; every relation edge requires an evidence ID.
sec_note_zh: 捆绑两个 Python 脚本：render_yao_geo_brand_graph.py 从结构化 report_input.json 生成 Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown 及 quality-report.json，collect_source_validation.py 会采样来源 URL 的可达性与页面标题（运行时需要联网）。读取来源账本与结构化输入，本地写出报告文件。不依赖任何私有/厂商系统；每条关系边都必须带证据 ID。
